scripts.dev: concurrently --names "BACKEND,FRONTEND,CASHIER,ADMIN,ECOM,STORE,MKT" --prefix-colors "cyan,magenta,yellow,green,blue,red,white" "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontend" "npm run dev --prefix cashier-app" "npm run dev --prefix admin-app" "npm run dev --prefix ecom-backend" "npm run dev --prefix storefront" "npm run dev --prefix marketing"
scripts.install:all: npm install && npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend && npm install --prefix cashier-app && npm install --prefix admin-app && npm install --prefix ecom-backend && npm install --prefix storefront && npm install --prefix marketing
scripts.seed:all: npm run db:generate && npm run db:push && npm run db:seed:all
scripts.seed:all:fast: npm run db:seed:all --prefix backend && node ecom-backend/prisma/seedEcom.js
